sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_SECOPS

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_8360cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c80
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_SECOPS</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_SECOPS</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_SECOPS = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_SECOPS.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Now Assist for Security Operations Plugin Status","order":"100","check_script":"(function() {
    var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
    gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_si_gen_ai");
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    if (gr.next()) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for Security Operations (sn_si_gen_ai) is active", finding: "Now Assist for Security Operations is active. AI-assisted security incident summarization, similar incident matching, and playbook recommendations are available." };
    }
    var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");
    gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_si_gen_ai");
    gr2.addQuery("active", true);
    gr2.setLimit(1);
    gr2.query();
    if (gr2.next()) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for Security Operations (sn_si_gen_ai) is active", finding: "Now Assist for Security Operations is active. AI-assisted security incident summarization, similar incident matching, and playbook recommendations are available." };
    }
    return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for Security Operations (sn_si_gen_ai) not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for Security Operations is not active. All Now Assist SIR AI capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." };
})","ai_justification":"Now Assist for Security Operations is the foundational plugin that enables all AI capabilities for SIR including incident summarization, similar incident matching, and playbook recommendations. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist for Security Operations via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Incident Volume","order":"200","check_script":"(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); ga.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 200) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " security incidents in last 12 months", finding: count + " security incidents in the last 12 months. Sufficient history for Now Assist SIR AI summarization and similar incident pattern learning." }; } else if (count >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " security incidents in last 12 months", finding: "Only " + count + " security incidents in the last 12 months (target: 200+). Now Assist SIR AI learning will have limited pattern coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: count + " security incidents in last 12 months", finding: "Only " + count + " security incidents in the last 12 months. Insufficient history for Now Assist SIR AI summarization and similar incident matching." }; } })","ai_justification":"Now Assist SIR uses historical security incident data for AI summarization and similar incident matching. Without sufficient incident history, AI pattern recognition has no training signal and will produce generic rather than context-specific recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure all security incidents are being captured in ServiceNow SIR. If volume is low due to recent implementation, allow data to accumulate before expecting optimal AI performance.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Incident Categorization Rate","order":"300","check_script":"(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaTotal.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4"); gaTotal.addQuery("closed_at", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No closed security incidents in last 12 months", finding: "No closed security incidents found. Categorization cannot be assessed." }; } var gaCat = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaCat.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4"); gaCat.addQuery("closed_at", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaCat.addQuery("category", "!=", ""); gaCat.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaCat.query(); var categorized = gaCat.next() ? parseInt(gaCat.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((categorized / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of closed security incidents categorized (" + categorized + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 85) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of closed security incidents have a category. Now Assist SIR has strong classification signal for AI routing and similar incident matching." }; } else if (pct >= 60) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of closed security incidents are categorized (target: 85%). Now Assist SIR AI routing accuracy will be reduced." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents are categorized. Insufficient classification signal for Now Assist SIR AI routing." }; } })","ai_justification":"Security incident categorization is the primary classification signal Now Assist SIR uses for similar incident matching and AI routing. Without consistent categorization, AI cannot group related incidents or recommend appropriate playbooks.","remediation_guidance":"Enforce category selection on security incident closure. Add mandatory field policy or workflow validation to require category before closing. Target: 85%+ categorization rate.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Incident Close Notes Population","order":"400","check_script":"(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaTotal.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4"); gaTotal.addQuery("closed_at", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No closed security incidents in last 12 months", finding: "No closed security incidents found. Close notes coverage cannot be assessed." }; } var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaMissing.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4"); gaMissing.addQuery("closed_at", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaMissing.addQuery("close_notes", ""); gaMissing.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaMissing.query(); var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var populated = total - missing; var pct = Math.round((populated / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of closed security incidents have close notes (" + populated + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 85) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of closed security incidents have close notes. Now Assist SIR summarization has strong resolution context for AI-generated summaries." }; } else if (pct >= 60) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of closed security incidents have close notes (target: 85%). Now Assist SIR summarization quality will be reduced." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents have close notes. Now Assist SIR cannot generate meaningful incident summaries without resolution context." }; } })","ai_justification":"Close notes contain the resolution context that Now Assist SIR uses to generate AI incident summaries and build similar incident recommendations. Without close notes, AI summaries are incomplete and similar incident matching loses its most valuable signal.","remediation_guidance":"Enforce close notes on security incident resolution. Add mandatory field policy requiring close_notes before incident closure. Close notes are the primary input for Now Assist SIR AI summarization.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Incident Assignment Group Configuration","order":"500","check_script":"(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var usedGroups = {}; var gr = new GlideRecord("sn_si_incident"); gr.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gr.addQuery("assignment_group", "!=", ""); gr.query(); while (gr.next()) { usedGroups[gr.getValue("assignment_group")] = true; } var groupIds = Object.keys(usedGroups); var totalGroups = groupIds.length; if (totalGroups === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No assignment groups used on security incidents in last 12 months", finding: "No assignment groups found on security incidents. Now Assist SIR AI routing has no group structure to route incidents to." }; } var groupsWithMembers = 0; for (var i = 0; i < groupIds.length; i++) { var memGr = new GlideRecord("sys_user_grmember"); memGr.addQuery("group", groupIds[i]); memGr.setLimit(1); memGr.query(); if (memGr.next()) groupsWithMembers++; } var pct = Math.round((groupsWithMembers / totalGroups) * 100); var actualValue = totalGroups + " security assignment groups | " + groupsWithMembers + " with active members (" + pct + "%)"; if (groupsWithMembers >= 2 && pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: groupsWithMembers + " populated security assignment groups. Now Assist SIR AI routing has well-defined staffed groups to route incidents to." }; } else if (groupsWithMembers >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + groupsWithMembers + " of " + totalGroups + " security assignment groups have members. Now Assist SIR AI routing may attempt to assign incidents to empty groups." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No security assignment groups have active members. Now Assist SIR AI routing cannot function without populated assignment groups." }; } })","ai_justification":"Assignment groups are the routing targets for Now Assist SIR AI recommendations. Without populated groups, AI routing suggestions have nowhere to send incidents and automated assignment will fail.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure all active security assignment groups have members. Populate group membership and assign managers to each group. Now Assist SIR uses group structure for AI-driven incident routing.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Playbook Configuration","order":"600","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sys_pd_process_definition");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sys_pd_process_definition not found", finding: "Process Automation Designer table is not available. Verify the Security Incident Response plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sys_pd_process_definition");
    ga.addQuery("sys_scope.scope", "sn_si");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (count >= 5) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active security playbooks configured", finding: count + " active security playbooks. Now Assist SIR can recommend AI-matched playbooks based on incident type and threat category." };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active security playbooks configured", finding: "Only " + count + " active security playbook(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist SIR playbook recommendations will have limited coverage across incident types." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "No active security playbooks found", finding: "No active security playbooks configured. Now Assist SIR cannot recommend playbooks without defined response procedures." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Security playbooks are the automated response procedures that Now Assist SIR recommends based on AI incident classification. Without playbooks, AI can identify incident type but cannot suggest structured response actions.","remediation_guidance":"Configure security playbooks for each major incident category. Navigate to Security Operations > Playbooks to create and activate playbooks for phishing, malware, data breach, insider threat, and DDoS scenarios.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Incident SLA Configuration","order":"700","check_script":"(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sla"); ga.addQuery("table", "CONTAINS", "sn_si_incident"); ga.addQuery("active", true); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active security incident SLA definitions", finding: count + " active security SLAs. Now Assist SIR can prioritize incidents using AI-driven SLA breach risk analysis." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active security incident SLA(s)", finding: "Only " + count + " active security SLA(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist SIR SLA-based AI prioritization will have limited differentiation across incident severity levels." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No active security incident SLAs defined", finding: "No active security incident SLAs. Now Assist SIR cannot differentiate incident urgency for AI prioritization without SLA definitions." }; } })","ai_justification":"Security incident SLAs define the urgency thresholds that Now Assist SIR uses for AI-driven prioritization. Without SLAs, all incidents appear equally urgent and AI cannot differentiate which incidents require immediate attention.","remediation_guidance":"Define SLAs for each security incident priority level. Navigate to Security Operations > Administration > SLA Definitions to configure response and resolution SLAs for Critical, High, Medium, and Low priority incidents.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Incident Workspace Configuration","order":"800","check_script":"(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_si_workspace"); gr.addQuery("active", true); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Security Incident Workspace (sn_si_workspace) is active", finding: "Security Incident Workspace is active. Now Assist SIR AI insights including incident summaries and playbook recommendations are surfaced in context for analysts." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Security Incident Workspace (sn_si_workspace) not found or inactive", finding: "Security Incident Workspace is not active. Now Assist SIR AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface." }; })","ai_justification":"Security Incident Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist SIR AI insights are presented to analysts. Without it, AI-generated summaries and playbook recommendations are produced but never surfaced where analysts work.","remediation_guidance":"Activate the Security Incident Workspace plugin via Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist SIR AI insights to surface in context for security analysts.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Incident Customization Risk","order":"900","check_script":"(function() { var gaBR = new GlideAggregate("sys_script"); gaBR.addQuery("collection", "sn_si_incident"); gaBR.addQuery("active", true); gaBR.addQuery("sys_created_by", "NOT IN", "glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy"); gaBR.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaBR.query(); var brs = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var gaCS = new GlideAggregate("sys_script_client"); gaCS.addQuery("table", "sn_si_incident"); gaCS.addQuery("active", true); gaCS.addQuery("sys_created_by", "NOT IN", "glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy"); gaCS.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaCS.query(); var cs = gaCS.next() ? parseInt(gaCS.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var risk = brs + cs; var actualValue = brs + " custom BRs + " + cs + " client scripts on sn_si_incident (risk score: " + risk + ")"; if (risk <= 5) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Low security incident customization risk (score: " + risk + "). Now Assist SIR AI Agent actions are unlikely to encounter conflicts." }; } else if (risk <= 10) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Moderate security incident customization risk (score: " + risk + "). Test Now Assist SIR in sub-production before enabling in production." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "High security incident customization risk (score: " + risk + "). Extensive customization increases the risk of conflicts with Now Assist SIR AI Agent actions." }; } })","ai_justification":"Custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on the security incident table can intercept or conflict with Now Assist SIR AI Agent actions. High customization density increases the risk of AI actions failing silently or producing unexpected results.","remediation_guidance":"Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_si_incident. Test Now Assist SIR in a sub-production environment to identify and resolve conflicts before enabling in production.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SECOPS","check_name":"Security Alert and Event Linkage","order":"1000","check_script":"(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90); var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaTotal.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No security incidents in last 90 days", finding: "No security incidents found in the last 90 days. Alert linkage cannot be assessed." }; } var gaLinked = new GlideAggregate("sn_si_incident"); gaLinked.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gaLinked.addQuery("alert", "!=", ""); gaLinked.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaLinked.query(); var linked = gaLinked.next() ? parseInt(gaLinked.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((linked / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of security incidents linked to alerts (last 90 days, " + linked + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts. Now Assist SIR has rich alert context for AI impact analysis and attack pattern recognition." }; } else if (pct >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts (target: 50%+). Now Assist SIR AI impact analysis will have limited alert context." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of security incidents are linked to alerts. Now Assist SIR cannot perform meaningful AI attack pattern recognition without alert-to-incident linkage." }; } })","ai_justification":"Alert-to-incident linkage provides Now Assist SIR with the threat signal context needed for AI attack pattern recognition and impact analysis. Without this linkage, AI can only analyze the incident record itself and misses the broader attack context that alerts provide.","remediation_guidance":"Configure alert rules to automatically link security alerts to incidents. Enable Event Management integration with SIR to ensure alerts from monitoring tools are correlated to security incidents.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_SECOPS'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:40</sys_created_on><sys_id>8360cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c80</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_SECOPS</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_8360cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c80</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
